company.name: Bicycle Therapeutics
company.subtitle: Bicycle peptide platform | Zelenectide mUC approval path rejected | Pivot to nuzefatide + radioconjugates

assets.name: Zelenectide pevedotin (BT8009) - Nectin-4 BDC
assets.stage: Phase 2/3 (Duravelo-2 mUC approval path rejected, dose selected)

market.notes: Duravelo-2 trial design NO LONGER acceptable as approval path per FDA (Mar 2026). 6mg dose selected with strong anti-tumor activity. Pivoting: Duravelo-3 (NECTIN4-amp breast cancer H2 2026 data), Duravelo-4 (NECTIN4-amp NSCLC). BDC = smaller than ADC, better tumor penetration.

us.patientsK.note: SEER: ~83K new bladder/yr US; ~25K muscle-invasive/metastatic on systemic tx. Source: NCI SEER 2024, BCAN.

eu.patientsK.note: EU5 ~95K new bladder/yr (GLOBOCAN); ~28K on systemic therapy.

row.patientsK.note: ROW ~80K on-tx; high incidence in smoking-heavy APAC + aniline dye regions.

us.wtpPct.note: ~62% -- Padcev+Keytruda (EV-302) 1L SOC 2024; Medicare + commercial NCCN Cat 1; BCG shortage drives intravesical alternatives.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~45% -- NICE approved Padcev+pembro 2024; G-BA betraechtlich; gem/cis remains cost-effective comparator.

row.wtpPct.note: ~14% -- Japan J-DPC covers Padcev; China NRDL tislelizumab; EM rely on gem/cis + BCG.

us.priceK.note: Blended $185K: Padcev+pembro $310K (35% pts) + nivo adj $165K (15%) + gem/cis+IO $95K (30%) + chemo alone $20K (20%).

eu.priceK.note: ~$105K blended; EU net ~57% US; Padcev combo priced ~EUR 195K/course.

penPct.note: ~50% peak -- EV+pembro displacing chemo 1L over 5yr; FGFR3 Balversa + HER2 ADCs (disitamab) expand 2L.

us.reachPct.note: Zelenectide pevedotin Nectin-4 bicycle ADC mUC post-Padcev; ~25K US mUC systemic; Duravelo-2 Ph2/3 2026; launch 2028 ~18% reach (Padcev entrenched $1.8B).

us.priceK.note: ~$195K/yr; Padcev $16K/dose x 12mo $190K reference; bicycle ADC smaller size differentiates TEAE profile.

us.wtpPct.note: ~50% -- Padcev SOC post-cis ineligible; Medicare Part B infused ADC; NCCN Cat 2A for Nectin-4 ADC class.

eu.reachPct.note: ~15% EU5 mUC; NICE TA692 Padcev 2021 precedent; EMA bicycle ADC novel platform.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~25% -- NICE + G-BA Padcev mUC reimb; Nectin-4 bicycle ADC positioning post-Padcev fail.

row.reachPct.note: ~8% ROW; Japan PMDA Padcev 2021; China NRDL Padcev 2023.

market.notes: First-in-class EphA2 BDC — historically undruggable target. Phase 1 nuzefatide + nivolumab in mUC data H1 2026. Phase 2 PDAC initiated. EphA2 broadly expressed across solid tumors.

us.patientsK.note: SEER: ~66K new PDAC/yr US; ~45K on systemic (mostly metastatic). Source: NCI SEER 2024, PanCAN.

eu.patientsK.note: EU5 ~95K PDAC/yr; ~60K on systemic per EUROCARE.

row.patientsK.note: ROW ~250K on-tx; rising incidence globally per GLOBOCAN 2022.

us.wtpPct.note: ~55% -- FOLFIRINOX + gem/nab-pac SOC; Lynparza BRCA+ 8%; KRAS G12C/D pipeline covered; Medicare broad.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~42% -- NICE approved FOLFIRINOX + gem/nabpac; olaparib BRCA+ maintenance via ASMR IV.

row.wtpPct.note: ~14% -- Japan J-DPC + China NRDL; EM rely on gemcitabine mono.

us.priceK.note: Blended $70K: FOLFIRINOX $45K (50% pts) + gem/nabpac $85K (35%) + PARPi BRCA+ $180K (5%) + Onivyde 2L $95K (10%).

eu.priceK.note: ~$40K blended; EU net ~57% US; chemo backbones generic.

penPct.note: ~40% peak -- poor OS limits prevalence buildup; KRAS inhibitors (G12D, pan-RAS) + NALIRIFOX reshape 5yr.

us.reachPct.note: Nuzefatide EphA2 bicycle ADC pan-tumor (NSCLC, PDAC, HNSCC); Ph1 2026; ~100K US EphA2-high solid; launch 2029+ <8% early reach.

us.priceK.note: ~$200K/yr projected; anchor to pan-tumor ADC class $180-220K.

us.wtpPct.note: ~40% -- EphA2 ADC novel target, Medicare Part B; payor access gated on Ph2 efficacy + biomarker assay.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~18% -- novel bicycle ADC EU access TBD.

market.notes: BT1702: MT1-MMP targeting BRC with lead-212. EphA2 human imaging data expected H1 2026. UK NDA/NNL/SpectronRx partnerships for 212Pb supply. Company-sponsored BRC clinical trial (BT1702) expected 2027. Bicycle peptide = ideal radiopharma targeting vehicle.

us.patientsK.note: ~30K US NSCLC w/o targetable driver (wild-type); IO+chemo SOC 1L. Source: NCI SEER + KEYNOTE-189 enrollment.

eu.patientsK.note: EU5 ~45K driver-negative NSCLC; ESMO NGS reflex excludes drivers.

row.patientsK.note: ROW ~180K driver-negative; smoking-associated heavy in APAC/EM.

us.wtpPct.note: ~65% -- Keytruda+chemo 1L (KN-189/407), Tecentriq+chemo, Libtayo; NCCN Cat 1; Medicare + commercial broad.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~48% -- NICE + G-BA approved pembro+chemo + atezo+chemo 1L; France ASMR III.

row.wtpPct.note: ~18% -- Japan PMDA full; China NRDL tislelizumab/sintilimab + chemo.

us.priceK.note: Blended $135K: pembro+chemo $175K (50% pts) + atezo/cemi+chemo $165K (15%) + IO+CTLA4 $210K (10%) + chemo alone $30K (25%).

row.priceK.note: ~$30K blended; China NRDL IO <$30K drives mix.

penPct.note: ~55% peak -- IO+chemo saturated 1L; LAG3 + TIGIT + PD1xVEGF (ivonescimab) 1L combos extend 5yr.

us.reachPct.note: Bicycle radioconjugate (BRC) platform lead MT1-MMP/other; preclinical 2025; Novartis/Lilly RLT space hot (Pluvicto $1.4B); launch 2030+ <5% reach.

us.wtpPct.note: ~35% speculative -- radioconjugate class premium post-Pluvicto; supply chain critical for isotope.

eu.reachPct.note: <5% EU5 preclinical; EMA RLT path via Pluvicto 2022.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~15% -- EU RLT access via specialist centers, Lu-177 supply constraints.

assets.name: BT7480 - Bicycle TICA (Nectin-4 x CD137)
assets.stage: Phase 1 (to be out-partnered after H1 2026 data)

market.notes: Nectin-4 targeted CD137 agonist. Phase 1 combo data H1 2026. BCYC will seek partner after reporting — no longer developing internally. Platform validation but not core focus.

us.patientsK.note: SEER: ~83K new bladder/yr US; ~25K muscle-invasive/metastatic on systemic tx. Source: NCI SEER 2024, BCAN.

eu.patientsK.note: EU5 ~95K new bladder/yr (GLOBOCAN); ~28K on systemic therapy.

row.patientsK.note: ROW ~80K on-tx; high incidence in smoking-heavy APAC + aniline dye regions.

us.wtpPct.note: ~62% -- Padcev+Keytruda (EV-302) 1L SOC 2024; Medicare + commercial NCCN Cat 1; BCG shortage drives intravesical alternatives.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~45% -- NICE approved Padcev+pembro 2024; G-BA betraechtlich; gem/cis remains cost-effective comparator.

row.wtpPct.note: ~14% -- Japan J-DPC covers Padcev; China NRDL tislelizumab; EM rely on gem/cis + BCG.

us.priceK.note: Blended $185K: Padcev+pembro $310K (35% pts) + nivo adj $165K (15%) + gem/cis+IO $95K (30%) + chemo alone $20K (20%).

eu.priceK.note: ~$105K blended; EU net ~57% US; Padcev combo priced ~EUR 195K/course.

penPct.note: ~50% peak -- EV+pembro displacing chemo 1L over 5yr; FGFR3 Balversa + HER2 ADCs (disitamab) expand 2L.

us.reachPct.note: BT7480 Nectin-4/CD137 TICA immune agonist solid tumors; Ph1 2024+; ~200K US Nectin-4+ pool; very early, <5% reach pre-2030.

us.priceK.note: ~$180K/yr projected; anchor to IO combo pricing $180-220K.

us.wtpPct.note: ~35% speculative -- TICA class unproven, 4-1BB toxicity history (urelumab); payor access gated on Ph2.

market.notes: Bicycle peptides: fully synthetic, small molecule PK, biologic-like binding. Nobel Prize science (Sir Greg Winter). Partnerships in non-oncology. Platform optionality.

us.patientsK.note: ~80K US across BT8009 (Nectin4+ bladder/other) + BT5528 (EphA2+) + BT7480 (Nectin4xCD137) targets. Source: Bicycle 10-K.

eu.patientsK.note: EU5 ~100K Bicycle-addressable across Nectin4 + EphA2 + MT1-MMP.

us.wtpPct.note: ~52% -- pre-commercial; model assumes Medicare + commercial at Padcev-like pricing given Nectin4 precedent.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~38% -- EMA pathway; NICE CDF for novel modality.

us.priceK.note: Blended $225K: Bicycle Toxin Conjugate (BTC) $240K (70% pts) + Bicycle TICA/CD137 $200K (30%); Padcev-benchmarked.

penPct.note: ~30% peak -- Phase 1/2 assets; BT8009 Phase 2/3 Duravelo; 5-7yr ramp from first approval ~2027+.

us.reachPct.note: Bicycle platform discovery partnerships (Novartis, Ionis, Genentech); milestones/royalties only; <5% direct commercial reach.

us.priceK.note: Royalty stream only; not end-patient pricing.

mega_bear.narrative: mUC dead + nuzefatide fails + BRC too early — Bicycle platform unproven
events: X Zelenectide mUC completely abandoned
X Nuzefatide EphA2 shows limited efficacy
X BRC radioconjugates face competition from established players
-> Cash burn continues, stock to $2-3 or reverse split territory

bear.narrative: Nuzefatide shows signal + BRC advancing but years from revenue
events: ~ Nuzefatide PDAC shows modest activity but not breakthrough
~ Zelenectide finds niche in NECTIN4-amplified breast cancer
~ BRC imaging data promising but clinical 2027+
-> Platform generates data but commercial path unclear

base.narrative: Nuzefatide validates EphA2 + BRC enters clinic + platform partnerships grow
events: V Nuzefatide Phase 2 PDAC encouraging — EphA2 validated
V Zelenectide finds path in NECTIN4-amplified tumors
V BRC radiopharma enters clinic 2027 — differentiated approach
V Platform generates 2+ new partnerships

bull.narrative: Bicycle platform vindicated — nuzefatide + BRC = new modality validated
events: V Nuzefatide best-in-class EphA2 — first approved BDC
V BRC radiopharma validated — Bicycle = ideal radiotargeting
V Platform licensed across oncology + non-oncology
V Stock recovers 5-10x from current levels

psychedelic_bull.narrative: Bicycle peptide = third major therapeutic modality alongside antibodies and small molecules
events: V Multiple approved BDC + BRC products
V Nobel Prize science (Greg Winter) finally commercialized
V Platform generates $5B+ in partnerships across 10+ programs
V Major pharma acquires for $5-10B

lastData.title: Duravelo-2 approval path rejected, pivoting to nuzefatide + BRC radiopharma
points: Zelenectide mUC: Duravelo-2 trial design no longer acceptable for approval (Mar 2026)
6mg dose selected — strong anti-tumor activity + differentiated safety
Nuzefatide (BT5528/EphA2): Phase 1 combo data mUC H1 2026, Phase 2 PDAC enrolling
BRC radioconjugates: EphA2 human imaging H1 2026, BT1702 (MT1-MMP) clinic 2027
BT7480 TICA: H1 2026 data then out-partnered
Stock crashed from $30+ to ~$5 on mUC setback

nextCatalyst.title: Nuzefatide mUC combo data + EphA2 imaging + zelenectide dose data presentation
thresholds: Nuzefatide + nivolumab Phase 1 mUC data H1 2026
EphA2 BRC human imaging data H1 2026
Zelenectide Duravelo-2 dose selection data at conference H1 2026
Duravelo-3 breast cancer initial data H2 2026

risks: Stock at $5 — effectively a turnaround/restructuring story
mUC approval path rejection is major strategic setback
Nuzefatide EphA2 is entirely unvalidated in Phase 2
BRC radiopharma 2+ years from clinical proof
ADC/BDC competition intense from established players
$360M market cap with $600M cash = negative enterprise value (market pricing in failure)
Platform has never produced an approved product in 15+ years

catalysts.title: Nuzefatide mUC combo + PDAC Phase 2 data
BT7480 Phase 1 combination data with nivolumab
catalysts._rationale: Company confirmed H1 2026 data presentation at scientific conference
